root_text.an10.113:1.3: Adhammañca viditvā anatthañca, dhammañca viditvā atthañca yathā dhammo yathā attho tathā paṭipajjitabbaṁ.
root_text.an10.113:2.1: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, adhammo ca anattho ca?
root_text.an10.113:2.2: Micchādiṭṭhi, micchāsaṅkappo, micchāvācā, micchākammanto, micchāājīvo, micchāvāyāmo, micchāsati, micchāsamādhi, micchāñāṇaṁ, micchāvimutti—
root_text.an10.113:2.3: ayaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, adhammo ca anattho ca.
root_text.an10.113:3.1: Katamo ca, bhikkhave, dhammo ca attho ca?
root_text.an10.113:3.2: Sammādiṭṭhi, sammāsaṅkappo, sammāvācā, sammākammanto, sammāājīvo, sammāvāyāmo, sammāsati, sammāsamādhi, sammāñāṇaṁ, sammāvimutti—
root_text.an10.113:3.3: ayaṁ vuccati, bhikkhave, dhammo ca attho ca.
root_text.an10.113:4.3: Adhammañca viditvā anatthañca, dhammañca viditvā atthañca yathā dhammo yathā attho tathā paṭipajjitabban’ti,
root_text.an10.113:4.4: iti yaṁ taṁ vuttaṁ, idametaṁ paṭicca vuttan”ti.

translation_text.an10.113:1.1: “Mendicants, you should know bad principles with bad results.
translation_text.an10.113:1.2: And you should know good principles with good results.
translation_text.an10.113:1.3: Knowing these things, your practice should follow the good principles with good results.
translation_text.an10.113:2.1: And what are bad principles with bad results?
translation_text.an10.113:2.2: Wrong view, wrong thought, wrong speech, wrong action, wrong livelihood, wrong effort, wrong mindfulness, wrong immersion, wrong knowledge, and wrong freedom.
translation_text.an10.113:2.3: These are called bad principles with bad results.
translation_text.an10.113:3.1: And what are good principles with good results?
translation_text.an10.113:3.2: Right view, right thought, right speech, right action, right livelihood, right effort, right mindfulness, right immersion, right knowledge, and right freedom.
translation_text.an10.113:3.3: These are called good principles with good results.
translation_text.an10.113:4.1: ‘You should know bad principles with bad results.
translation_text.an10.113:4.2: And you should know good principles with good results.
translation_text.an10.113:4.3: Knowing these things, your practice should follow the good principles with good results.’
translation_text.an10.113:4.4: That’s what I said, and this is why I said it.”
